parameter.name: IssuerUri
parameter.description: Used to identity the identity server used

parameter.name: RequiredScope
parameter.description: Used to identify the scopes needed to use the APIs

parameter.name: LandingUri
parameter.description: Used to identify the Unity web site

parameter.name: ImagesUri
parameter.description: DAM image location

parameter.name: DocumentUri
parameter.description: DAM asset location

parameter.name: IdentityServerSigningCertThumbprint
parameter.description: The thumbprint of the SSL certificate to use with IdentityServer

parameter.name: CESURL
parameter.description: Common email service to use for Unified UI email generation

parameter.name: SystemGUID
parameter.description: Used during email generation

parameter.name: VendorServicesIssueUri
parameter.description: Used to override the identity server used to get the api token when calling VendorServices

parameter.name: OrgMasterId
parameter.description: Used to store the RealPage blue book company id

parameter.name: cors_allowOrigins
parameter.description: Origins allowed for CORS

parameter.name: Environment
parameter.description: Unity environment

parameter.name: ElasticSearchUri
parameter.description: URL for Elastic Search

parameter.name: ElasticSearchAuthDetails
parameter.description: Authentication details for Elastic Search

parameter.name: LogPath
parameter.description: Path to use for file logging

parameter.name: LogProductName
parameter.description: Product name to use for logging

parameter.name: ElasticSearchIndexTypeName
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldWriteInFile
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldLogPerformance
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldLogDiagnostic
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ActivityMQName
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing
